---
name: Feature / module request
about: Propose a new module, capability, or improvement for PTAF
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

What do you want to add or change?

## Category

- [ ] New offensive simulation module
- [ ] New defensive detection module
- [ ] New AI-analysis plugin
- [ ] Collaboration / tooling (issue templates, CI, docs, etc.)
- [ ] Other:

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who is it for (SOC analyst, threat hunter,
red teamer, etc.)?

## Proposed design (if you have one)

- MITRE ATT&CK technique(s) this maps to (offensive/defensive):
- Inputs / outputs:
- Dependencies:
- Safety considerations (see CONTRIBUTING.md's safety bar):

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you preferred this one.

## Additional context

Links, references, or examples from other tools (Atomic Red Team, Caldera,
Sigma, etc.) that inform this request.
